creator: alexbestms@math.uni-muenster.de
text:
unfortunately the jmicron controller driver is also suffering from similar
issues. see kern/133122 for more details. the problems were observed with a
dvd-drive manufactured by LG. so the problems aren't specific to any dvd-drive
vendor it appears.

it might be possible that both the ich8r and jmicron drivers are broken and
this a problem with the ich8r driver after all.

alex
